scripts.setup: mise trust mise.toml && mise install && mise run setup
scripts.lint: bunx turbo run lint && bun run zig:lint
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:contract && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: zig test src/parse_utils.zig && bun test tests/unit
scripts.test:e2e: bun run zmx:apply && (cd third_party/zmx && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe) && bun test tests/e2e
scripts.zmx:smoke: bun run zmx:apply && bun run scripts/zmx-smoke.ts
scripts.web:build: bun run libghosty:apply && sh -c 'test -f third_party/libghostty/ghostty-vt.wasm || (cd third_party/libghostty && bun run build:wasm)' && cd web && bun run build
scripts.web:typecheck: bun run libghosty:apply && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.web:lint: bun run libghosty:apply && cd web && bun run lint
scripts.ast:zig:parse: sh ./scripts/tree-sitter.sh parse zig src/main.zig src/session_http.zig src/session_manager.zig src/session_backends.zig
scripts.ast:zig:functions: sh ./scripts/tree-sitter.sh query zig ./tools/tree-sitter/queries/zig/functions.scm src/main.zig src/session_http.zig src/session_manager.zig src/session_backends.zig
scripts.ast:ts:parse: sh ./scripts/tree-sitter.sh parse ts web/src/main.ts web/src/session.ts web/src/terminal-client.ts
scripts.ast:ts:functions: sh ./scripts/tree-sitter.sh query ts ./tools/tree-sitter/queries/typescript/functions.scm web/src/main.ts web/src/session.ts web/src/terminal-client.ts
scripts.ast:scan: bun run ast:zig:functions && bun run ast:ts:functions
